title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
